nodes.text: ＊yawn*... My head hurts... I won’t drink anymore... At least, not today... I swear to Megion that

nodes.text: I-It’s okay, I’ll do that.
Thank you for taking care of me, so I’m going to do it.
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「Thank you for taking care of me, so I’m going to do it. 」

nodes.text: Good morning. What’s wrong with the bells? I can pretty much imagine it.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0037】「Good morning. What’s wrong with the bells? I can pretty much imagine it.」

nodes.text: When Shaon-sama helps me clean and do laundry...
nodes.original_line: 【Chimes,S061_B2_0003】「When Shaon-sama helps me clean and do laundry... 」

nodes.text: Yes. Please let me do something.
Everyone has their own job to do. The chimes are masters of housework, so please don’t take that.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0038】「Everyone has their own job to do. The chimes are masters of housework, so please don’t take that.」

nodes.text: ! ...I’m sorry, Chimes
Shaon-kun, since you’re in the capital, you should go see the coliseum today.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0039】「Shaon-kun, since you’re in the capital, you should go see the coliseum today. 」

nodes.text: I heard about that in town yesterday.
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「I heard about that in town yesterday.」

nodes.text: Today’s the day of the match. I think it’ll be good social studies. I’ll let Radha guide you. Everyone go together at
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0040】「Today’s the day of the match. I think it’ll be good social studies. I’ll let Radha guide you. Everyone go together at 」

nodes.text: Thank you very much. I will wake everyone up at
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「Thank you very much. I will wake everyone up at 」

nodes.text: I’ll arrange for you to meet Shaon and the higher-ups.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0041】「I’ll arrange for you to meet Shaon and the higher-ups.」

nodes.text: A tremendous roar engulfs the arena.
Amazing. I’ve never seen so many people here before!
nodes.original_line: 【Ebita,S004_B2_0055】「Amazing. I’ve never seen so many people here before! 」

nodes.text: Let the fighters and monsters fight, and the audience will bet on who wins. Just watch and enjoy... That’s the coliseum. It’s a specialty of the imperial capital, Starry Gate.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0016】「Let the fighters and monsters fight, and the audience will bet on who wins. Just watch and enjoy... That’s the coliseum. It’s a specialty of the imperial capital, Starry Gate.」

nodes.text: There are other races that compete for speed. I like that one a lot too~
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0017】「There are other races that compete for speed. I like that one a lot too~ 」

nodes.text: I’m full of fighting spirit! It’s starting to itch!
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0068】「I’m full of fighting spirit! It’s starting to itch! 」

nodes.text: First card. The rules are martial, heavenly! High-strung fighter raised in the northern Storm! Steiken!! I’ve already won eight!
nodes.original_line: 【Ponse@Host Ponse,S056_B2_0001】「First card. The rules are martial, heavenly! High-strung fighter raised in the northern Storm! Steiken!! I’ve already won eight!」

nodes.text: Hey, hey! Come at me!
Meanwhile, the bull of Nanbu Bagel! Jacoby!! I just won one last time!
nodes.original_line: 【Ponse@Host Ponse,S056_B2_0002】「Meanwhile, the bull of Nanbu Bagel! Jacoby!! I just won one last time! 」

nodes.text: I’m so glad my opponent’s so lively. I’ll throw him down.
nodes.original_line: 【Jacobie,S054_B2_0001】「I’m so glad my opponent’s so lively. I’ll throw him down.」

nodes.text: Now, time to show off. If you’re going to bet, now’s your chance. Steyken or Jacoby
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0018】「Now, time to show off. If you’re going to bet, now’s your chance. Steyken or Jacoby」

nodes.text: The two fighters are performing a performance to show their strength.
nodes.original_line: 【】The two fighters are performing a performance to show their strength.

nodes.text: Who do you think will win, Urszula?
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「Who do you think will win, Urszula?」

nodes.text: Hmm. Both of them have a pretty strong atmosphere, but judging by their movements... I don’t think that Jacoby can catch Steyken’s speed.
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0069】「Hmm. Both of them have a pretty strong atmosphere, but judging by their movements... I don’t think that Jacoby can catch Steyken’s speed. 」

nodes.text: But the rule is that there’s a martial arts heaven. You can use both weapons and Heavenly Familias. I have no idea what’s going to happen.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0019】「But the rule is that there’s a martial arts heaven. You can use both weapons and Heavenly Familias. I have no idea what’s going to happen. 」

nodes.text: I’m worried about fighting, but I’m also worried about the food stalls selling food! Damn it, I’ll look around!
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0048】「I’m worried about fighting, but I’m also worried about the food stalls selling food! Damn it, I’ll look around!」

nodes.text: As I thought, Steyken of Stability is gaining popularity! It’s almost time for the deadline!
nodes.original_line: 【Ponse@Host Ponse,S056_B2_0003】「As I thought, Steyken of Stability is gaining popularity! It’s almost time for the deadline! 」

nodes.text: Well, even I’m a challenger, but this place is tough and tough. Fufufu, I have good intuition. Do you remember this?
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0020】「Well, even I’m a challenger, but this place is tough and tough. Fufufu, I have good intuition. Do you remember this? 」

nodes.text: All right, since I’ve come all this way, I’ll go buy Stey Ken.
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0070】「All right, since I’ve come all this way, I’ll go buy Stey Ken.」

nodes.text: Since you’re here, why don’t you try buying it? This is part of your social studies.
nodes.original_line: 【Petter,S005_B2_0071】「Since you’re here, why don’t you try buying it? This is part of your social studies. 」

nodes.text: Me... Let’s follow
Radha-san’s advice.
Hey, young man. I’ll listen to what your sister has to say.

nodes.text: This is a Jacoby!
So it’s backwards. Shaon-kun, that’s naive. Heheheh.

nodes.text: Now then, let’s go to Batouuuuurstard!!!

Steken tried to run away, but his opponent sucked him in.

nodes.text: Uwah!!!
The winner is Jacoby!!
It’s simple. The big, heavy guy is amazing. He’s strong.

nodes.text: Gwah, I didn’t expect that. It’s so hot...! I’m getting excited!
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0072】「Gwah, I didn’t expect that. It’s so hot...! I’m getting excited!」

nodes.text: We missed
That’s part of it. Don’t worry, don’t hold back!
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0023】「That’s part of it. Don’t worry, don’t hold back! 」

nodes.text: You’re making such a refreshing face despite not expecting it.
nodes.original_line: 【Ebita,S004_B2_0058】「You’re making such a refreshing face despite not expecting it.」

nodes.text: I did it. I won
It’s good, young man. Take good care of your bikini crack.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0024】「It’s good, young man. Take good care of your bikini crack. 」

nodes.text: Even though you bought a ticket, you look refreshed.
nodes.original_line: 【Petter,S005_B2_0073】「Even though you bought a ticket, you look refreshed.」

nodes.text: It’s a face that doesn’t show any negative emotions. Honestly, I want to cry.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0025】「It’s a face that doesn’t show any negative emotions. Honestly, I want to cry. 」

nodes.text: When I’m in debt to someone I know, this face lends me more money than I expected. I feel like I’ll be able to pay it back easily.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0026】「When I’m in debt to someone I know, this face lends me more money than I expected. I feel like I’ll be able to pay it back easily. 」

nodes.text: You’re a pretty useless adult.
By the way, Mr. Jacoby, did you just use the Celestial Familia?
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「By the way, Mr. Jacoby, did you just use the Celestial Familia?」

nodes.text: I wonder if it’s a Celestial Familia that draws the opponent to its own side. It’s probably a short distance away, but it fits well with its own physique... Ugh. If only I knew it had such a Celemonic.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0027】「I wonder if it’s a Celestial Familia that draws the opponent to its own side. It’s probably a short distance away, but it fits well with its own physique... Ugh. If only I knew it had such a Celemonic.」

nodes.speaker_internal: Old man confident in the arena.
nodes.speaker_display: Old man confident in the arena.
nodes.text: Onee-chan, you’re so young. There are times when the Celestial Familia defeats people who don’t know their place. If you bet on them, they’ll be delicious.
nodes.original_line: 【Old man confident in the arena.,S444_B2_0001】「Onee-chan, you’re so young. There are times when the Celestial Familia defeats people who don’t know their place. If you bet on them, they’ll be delicious.」

nodes.text: No, no, old man. When you won your debut match, you didn’t use your Heavenly Familia, so I don’t think you had it.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0028】「No, no, old man. When you won your debut match, you didn’t use your Heavenly Familia, so I don’t think you had it. 」

nodes.speaker_internal: Old man confident in the arena.
nodes.speaker_display: Old man confident in the arena.
nodes.text: The opponent was weak in the first match, so you were able to save it. But this time, it’s Steyken. There’s a good chance it’ll come out. You have to think about that too.
nodes.original_line: 【Old man confident in the arena.,S444_B2_0002】「The opponent was weak in the first match, so you were able to save it. But this time, it’s Steyken. There’s a good chance it’ll come out. You have to think about that too. 」

nodes.text: Nu-. Okay, I’ll guess next time! Besides, if you missed, that means you’ll win next time.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0029】「Nu-. Okay, I’ll guess next time! Besides, if you missed, that means you’ll win next time.」

nodes.text: Radha-san, don’t get too worked up...
Ahahaha. She’s amazing! It’s super fun!
? What are you laughing at all of a sudden, Ebi?
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「? What are you laughing at all of a sudden, Ebi?」

nodes.text: You’ll make your daughter laugh, watch the arena, munch munch
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0050】「You’ll make your daughter laugh, watch the arena, munch munch」

nodes.text: Hey, old man, you were strong! You’re up against me next!!
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0073】「Hey, old man, you were strong! You’re up against me next!! 」

nodes.text: Ahhhn? I’ve never seen you before.
Whoops! It’s a pretty girl, a beautiful girl is barging in!
nodes.original_line: 【Ponse@Host Ponse,S056_B2_0008】「Whoops! It’s a pretty girl, a beautiful girl is barging in! 」

nodes.text: You did it. She couldn’t hold back her feelings, fufu
nodes.original_line: 【Petter,S005_B2_0074】「You did it. She couldn’t hold back her feelings, fufu」

nodes.text: She probably wants to see how far her skills can get in the capital.
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0051】「She probably wants to see how far her skills can get in the capital.」

We’re jumping in! We came to the capital yesterday. Let’s do it with me...!

Ah, hey!! Can’t you take it like this?!

nodes.text: Hey, pick it up!

nodes.text: The crowd cheered warmly for Urszula.
It doesn’t matter what the match is, it’ll always be fun. Sometimes, that kind of troubled customer gets caught up in the heat of the moment. If it’s just once, it can only be a sideshow.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0031】「It doesn’t matter what the match is, it’ll always be fun. Sometimes, that kind of troubled customer gets caught up in the heat of the moment. If it’s just once, it can only be a sideshow. 」

...Damn, I got more into it than I thought. I’m embarrassed.

nodes.text: If you win the coliseum, you’ll make money. You’ll become famous. I don’t think you want to fight a pointless battle to win the big one. That’s just how it is. Fighters are people with

Who knows. The next match will be the thrall everyone fears, the assassin Su?liebud, who sucked twenty-six people’s blood in the Swamp of the Large Sword Tiger and Singol!!

If those monsters go on a rampage, the spectators here will die

nodes.text: But that won’t happen, will it? Those guards will protect them.

nodes.text: That’s why I’m careful about safety. That coliseam guard is strong. There’s a lot of work done by past fighters.

nodes.text: I may not be serious, but I was thrown out just now.

nodes.text: Well, you’ll calm down after eating. Look at this takoyaki. It’s crunchy outside, and it’s perfect for pouring ale in.

nodes.text: Be careful not to eat too much food. Hypertension is a formidable enemy. Urszula, even you’re an enemy.
nodes.original_line: 【Petter,S005_B2_0076】「Be careful not to eat too much food. Hypertension is a formidable enemy. Urszula, even you’re an enemy. 」

nodes.text: I have nothing to do with sickness. Not a single bad thing about it.

nodes.text: That’s what everyone says when they’re young...

It’s Rhodia’s forehead!! Low Deaaaah!!

Ron is half dragon and half human, so that makes sense. If

nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「...She’s definitely strong... and beautiful... I feel like I’ve seen her somewhere before... That feeling.」

nodes.text: The Lon tribe, who were probably mixed in with the people from the Commonwealth who attacked the bandit fortress,
nodes.original_line: 【Petter,S005_B2_0078】「The Lon tribe, who were probably mixed in with the people from the Commonwealth who attacked the bandit fortress, 」

nodes.text: Aah... Um!
Mm, four seconds! Let’s bet on four seconds.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0037】「Mm, four seconds! Let’s bet on four seconds.」

nodes.text: The monsters were threatening Rhodia from inside the cage.
nodes.original_line: 【】The monsters were threatening Rhodia from inside the cage.

nodes.text: You guys were brought here too.
End the match in an instant,
Begin the match!!!!
released from the cage for only two seconds.
nodes.original_line: 【】 released from the cage for only two seconds.

nodes.text: The thing that had been my life just a moment ago is lying there. The girl named Rhodia instantly kills the monster.
nodes.original_line: 【】The thing that had been my life just a moment ago is lying there. The girl named Rhodia instantly kills the monster.

nodes.text: 2 seconds! As usual, I have no intention of getting excited! But that’s fine! That’s good!! It’s just a Soul Reaper who stoically kills his opponent! The challenger is always on the receiving end!
nodes.original_line: 【Ponse@Host Ponse,S056_B2_0013】「2 seconds! As usual, I have no intention of getting excited! But that’s fine! That’s good!! It’s just a Soul Reaper who stoically kills his opponent! The challenger is always on the receiving end! 」

nodes.text: Ahhh, it’s too early!! I missed!!
Could it be that Radha-san’s intuition is good, but gambling is weak?
nodes.original_line: 【】Could it be that Radha-san’s intuition is good, but gambling is weak?

nodes.text: ......She’s unbelievably strong. Did she use Heavenly Familia?
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0081】「......She’s unbelievably strong. Did she use Heavenly Familia? 」

nodes.text: She probably didn’t. She defeated her with a normal attack.
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0054】「She probably didn’t. She defeated her with a normal attack.」

nodes.text: Do you think you can beat Rhodia, Urszula?
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「Do you think you can beat Rhodia, Urszula? 」

nodes.text: ...I hate to admit it, but... even if you do it now, you’ll never win...!
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0082】「...I hate to admit it, but... even if you do it now, you’ll never win...! 」

nodes.text: If you can tell how strong your opponent is, then you’ve grown.
nodes.original_line: 【Ebita,S004_B2_0062】「If you can tell how strong your opponent is, then you’ve grown.」

nodes.text: Rhodia coolly left.
If she’s that strong, then she can become one of the Five Stars, right?
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0083】「If she’s that strong, then she can become one of the Five Stars, right? 」

nodes.text: Rhodia has no intention of doing that. You saw how cool she looks.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0039】「Rhodia has no intention of doing that. You saw how cool she looks.」

nodes.text: She doesn’t seem interested in anything, does she? She usually guards Lord Nervion, a member of the Imperial family, and only comes to the coliseum when there’s a match.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0040】「She doesn’t seem interested in anything, does she? She usually guards Lord Nervion, a member of the Imperial family, and only comes to the coliseum when there’s a match. 」

nodes.text: Nervions... I’ve heard that somewhere before... Have I read about it in the newspaper?
nodes.original_line: 【Ebita,S004_B2_0063】「Nervions... I’ve heard that somewhere before... Have I read about it in the newspaper? 」

nodes.text: Raniero’s son. He’s the younger brother of Emperor Noa.
nodes.original_line: 【Petter,S005_B2_0079】「Raniero’s son. He’s the younger brother of Emperor Noa.」

nodes.text: Oh? There’s so much to learn, it’s hard, Shaon.
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0055】「Oh? There’s so much to learn, it’s hard, Shaon.」

nodes.text: It’s fun to spread out the world.
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「It’s fun to spread out the world. 」

nodes.text: I’ll definitely win next time! Then I’ll treat you to some.
nodes.original_line: 【Rada,S038_B2_0041】「I’ll definitely win next time! Then I’ll treat you to some.」

nodes.text: We went sightseeing around the capital, with the coliseum at the center.
nodes.original_line: 【】We went sightseeing around the capital, with the coliseum at the center.

nodes.text: -That night.
Yaaaah, that was amazing. And Radha was totally off the mark!
nodes.original_line: 【Ebita,S004_B2_0064】「Yaaaah, that was amazing. And Radha was totally off the mark!」

nodes.text: Hehe. I’m glad we had a fun day.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0042】「Hehe. I’m glad we had a fun day. 」

nodes.text: Thanks to you, Radha-san, for escorting me.
nodes.original_line: 【Shaon】「Thanks to you, Radha-san, for escorting me. 」

nodes.text: Tomorrow, Shaon-kun and Urszula will come with me. We’ve arranged for you to be introduced to the Imperial Army.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0043】「Tomorrow, Shaon-kun and Urszula will come with me. We’ve arranged for you to be introduced to the Imperial Army.」

nodes.text: ...If the Damian Urszula mentioned really is General Damian, then it’s definitely better to use that connection, but
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0044】「...If the Damian Urszula mentioned really is General Damian, then it’s definitely better to use that connection, but 」

nodes.text: She’s not here, so it can’t be helped. When that time comes, I’ll move while I can. I’ve seen someone so strong
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0084】「She’s not here, so it can’t be helped. When that time comes, I’ll move while I can. I’ve seen someone so strong 」

nodes.text: Today. My body’s itching to do it! Training!!
nodes.original_line: 【Urszula,S008_B2_0085】「Today. My body’s itching to do it! Training!!」

nodes.text: Don’t do push-ups here. Do it in your own room.
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0056】「Don’t do push-ups here. Do it in your own room. 」

nodes.text: Ahaha. The house suddenly became lively. Gulp, gulp,
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0045】「Ahaha. The house suddenly became lively. Gulp, gulp, 」

nodes.text: Foru. You don’t drink wine all the time. I like it.
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0057】「Foru. You don’t drink wine all the time. I like it.」

nodes.text: Once I’m done with work, I’ll drink and sleep! That’s all I’ve got. Come on, God, drink it. It’s called divine wine.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0046】「Once I’m done with work, I’ll drink and sleep! That’s all I’ve got. Come on, God, drink it. It’s called divine wine. 」

nodes.text: Fine. ...Gulp, heh, this is a good grape. The sweetness is running wild in my mouth.
nodes.original_line: 【Minjara,S048_B2_0058】「Fine. ...Gulp, heh, this is a good grape. The sweetness is running wild in my mouth. 」

nodes.text: This is Celal wine from Treley County. The head of the Commonwealth likes it too. I know he likes alcohol. ...Still, I can’t help but be jealous of his body.
nodes.original_line: 【Petter,S005_B2_0080】「This is Celal wine from Treley County. The head of the Commonwealth likes it too. I know he likes alcohol. ...Still, I can’t help but be jealous of his body.」

nodes.text: All right. Let’s have a drinking contest with the gods.
nodes.original_line: 【Foru,S035_B2_0047】「All right. Let’s have a drinking contest with the gods.」
